text: As I step into this space, I’m greeted with a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The environment feels modern and intentional, with displays and signage suggesting a focus on research, development, and innovation. The glass walls give a sense of transparency, yet the technology and text inside hint at the boundaries between observer and participant. I feel eager to learn, aware of my presence here as both subject and witness—a thinker among thinkers in a place that treasures exploration.
